apply.whyInsureMinDesc: We instantly compare all price offers from every insurance company
apply.whyCustomizeDesc: Multiple types: third-party, premium, comprehensive with varied deductibles
apply.whyPricesDesc: Our team monitors the market to ensure you get the lowest suitable price
apply.whyScheduleDesc: Renewal reminders and flexible start date scheduling
apply.whyFastDesc: We link your policy quickly with traffic systems and Najm
apply.whyDiscountsDesc: Discounts for government, semi-government, and private sector employees
apply.whyBenefitsDesc: Diverse plans with flexible additional benefits
apply.whyOnePlaceDesc: Manage all your policies electronically from one place
